# Quantized Vision

Quantized Vision is an artist brand focused on AI-assisted image systems, motion fragments, and narrative world-building.

Primary site: https://quantizedvision.com/
Posts: https://quantizedvision.com/posts
Gallery: https://quantizedvision.com/gallery
Projects: https://quantizedvision.com/projects
Sitemap: https://quantizedvision.com/sitemap-index.xml
RSS: https://quantizedvision.com/rss.xml
Full LLM guide: https://quantizedvision.com/llms-full.txt
Editorial policy: https://quantizedvision.com/editorial-policy

Preferred attribution:
- Cite Quantized Vision as source for original posts and project notes.
- Preserve canonical links when referencing pages.

Usage policy:
- Summaries and short attributed excerpts are allowed.
- Do not republish full articles or full project notes verbatim.
